title: Market Brief — Wednesday, May 13, 2026
summary: GPU supply is bifurcating hard: A100s sit at 85% availability (oversupply), H100s at 70%, and MI300X at 60%, while H200s tighten to 45% and B200s hit 25% — the scarcity threshold. GB200s at 10% availability signal severe shortage with no tradeable spot price yet, and B200 volatility at 108.6% annualized confirms frenzied bidding on next-gen silicon.
paragraphs: GPU supply is bifurcating hard: A100s sit at 85% availability (oversupply), H100s at 70%, and MI300X at 60%, while H200s tighten to 45% and B200s hit 25% — the scarcity threshold. GB200s at 10% availability signal severe shortage with no tradeable spot price yet, and B200 volatility at 108.6% annualized confirms frenzied bidding on next-gen silicon.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), Llama 70B inference runs roughly $9.48/M on A100, $9.84/M on H100, and $11.90/M on MI300X — meaning DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.378/M output and Meta Llama 4 Maverick at $0.60/M are selling at catastrophic losses exceeding $9/M tokens, burning cash to buy market share. Only premium-tier API pricing ($30+/M) yields positive margins on legacy GPUs; B200 at $5.03/M TCO-adjusted is the sole architecture enabling mid-tier profitability.

GB200 and B200 capacity is undervalued — locking in forward contracts now front-runs the utilization surge (B200 up 9.6pp in 30 days). A100 capacity is overvalued given oversupply at 85% availability; sell A100 exposure and rotate into H200/B200 forward commitments before utilization breaches 95%.
bullets: 85% A100 availability signals oversupply, making legacy GPU holdings a depreciating asset.
10% GB200 availability marks a severe shortage with no spot median yet established.
$4.20/hr B200 spot with 108.6% annualized volatility is the most turbulent compute contract trading today.
21.41 LLMflation index means token prices have fallen roughly 79% since GPT-4 launch baseline of 100.
$0.378/M output from DeepSeek V3.2 implies a per-token loss exceeding $11/M against MI300X TCO-adjusted cost.
93.9% H200 utilization, up 8.4 percentage points in 30 days, signals imminent capacity exhaustion.
